items.title: Service Request

caseId.description: String case id to reference the support case.

items.title: Communication Details

direction.description: Direction of the communication of the service request.

text.description: Text message of the service request.

type.description: Source of the communication of the service request.

items.description: Details about the communication in the service request.

createDate.description: Timestamp when the service request was created.

solvedDate.description: Timestamp when the service request was marked as solved.

status.description: Current status of the service request.

subject.description: Subject of the service request ticket.

text.description: Text body of the service request ticket.

items.description: Detailed content of the service request ticket.
